WITH "events" AS (
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201227
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201228
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201229
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201230
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20201231
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210101
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210102
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210103
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210104
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210105
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210106
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ("EVENT_TIMESTAMP" / 1000000) AS "event_ts",
    "EVENT_PARAMS"
  FROM GA4.GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE.EVENTS_20210107
),
"engaged_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "e"."USER_PSEUDO_ID",
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', "e"."event_ts") AS "event_day"
  FROM "events" AS "e",
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "e"."EVENT_PARAMS") AS "ep"
  WHERE "ep"."VALUE":"key"::STRING = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND COALESCE("ep"."VALUE":"value":"int_value"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
    AND "e"."event_ts" <= '2021-01-07 23:59:59'::TIMESTAMP_NTZ
    AND "e"."event_ts" >= '2021-01-01 00:00:00'::TIMESTAMP_NTZ
),
"seven_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM "engaged_users"
  WHERE "event_day" BETWEEN '2021-01-01'::TIMESTAMP_NTZ AND '2021-01-07'::TIMESTAMP_NTZ
),
"two_day_users" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "USER_PSEUDO_ID"
  FROM "engaged_users"
  WHERE "event_day" BETWEEN '2021-01-06'::TIMESTAMP_NTZ AND '2021-01-07'::TIMESTAMP_NTZ
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "distinct_pseudo_users"
FROM "seven_day_users" AS "s"
LEFT JOIN "two_day_users" AS "t"
  ON "s"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" = "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID"
WHERE "t"."USER_PSEUDO_ID" IS NULL;

WITH "all_sessions_2017" AS (
  SELECT "date", "totals", "trafficSource" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
),
"source_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "traffic_source",
    SUM(COALESCE("totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0)) AS "total_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions_2017"
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-01-01'::DATE AND '2017-12-31'::DATE
    AND "trafficSource":"source" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT
),
"top_traffic_source" AS (
  SELECT "traffic_source"
  FROM "source_totals"
  ORDER BY "total_transaction_revenue" DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
"monthly_revenue" AS (
  SELECT
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "traffic_source",
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    SUM(COALESCE("totals":"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER, 0)) AS "monthly_transaction_revenue"
  FROM "all_sessions_2017"
  WHERE TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN '2017-01-01'::DATE AND '2017-12-31'::DATE
    AND "trafficSource":"source" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    "trafficSource":"source"::TEXT,
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TRY_TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD'))
)
SELECT
  "mr"."traffic_source",
  ROUND((MAX("mr"."monthly_transaction_revenue") - MIN("mr"."monthly_transaction_revenue")) / 1000000, 2) AS "difference_in_millions"
FROM "monthly_revenue" AS "mr"
INNER JOIN "top_traffic_source" AS "tts"
  ON "mr"."traffic_source" = "tts"."traffic_source"
GROUP BY "mr"."traffic_source"
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=metric_first) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

WITH "feb_sessions" AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "visitId", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170202
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "visitId", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170217
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "visitId", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170218
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "visitId", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170219
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "visitId", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170224
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "visitId", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170225
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "visitId", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170227
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", "date", "visitId", "totals", "device"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170228
),
"first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN(TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "feb_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"transaction_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "transaction_date",
    "visitId",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_type"
  FROM "feb_sessions"
  WHERE COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1
),
"first_transaction" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "transaction_date",
    "device_type"
  FROM "transaction_sessions"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId"
    ORDER BY "transaction_date", "visitId"
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  ft."fullVisitorId",
  DATEDIFF('day', fv."first_visit_date", ft."transaction_date") AS "days_elapsed",
  ft."device_type"
FROM "first_transaction" AS ft
JOIN "first_visit" AS fv
  ON ft."fullVisitorId" = fv."fullVisitorId"
ORDER BY ft."fullVisitorId"
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -15.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170615
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170616
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170620
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170625
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170626
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "date", "trafficSource", "hits" FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630
),
"base" AS (
  SELECT
    "s"."trafficSource":"source"::TEXT AS "source",
    TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "date",
    "p".value:"productRevenue"::NUMBER AS "product_revenue"
  FROM "sessions" AS "s",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "h",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "h".value:"product") AS "p"
  WHERE "s"."trafficSource":"source" IS NOT NULL
    AND "p".value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
    AND TO_DATE("s"."date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN DATE '2017-01-01' AND DATE '2017-06-30'
),
"source_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "source",
    SUM("product_revenue") AS "total_product_revenue"
  FROM "base"
  GROUP BY "source"
),
"top_source" AS (
  SELECT "source"
  FROM "source_totals"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "total_product_revenue" DESC, "source") = 1
),
"daily" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('DAY', "b"."date") AS "period_start",
    SUM("b"."product_revenue") AS "period_revenue"
  FROM "base" AS "b"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "t"
    ON "b"."source" = "t"."source"
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('DAY', "b"."date")
),
"weekly" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', "b"."date") AS "period_start",
    SUM("b"."product_revenue") AS "period_revenue"
  FROM "base" AS "b"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "t"
    ON "b"."source" = "t"."source"
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', "b"."date")
),
"monthly" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "b"."date") AS "period_start",
    SUM("b"."product_revenue") AS "period_revenue"
  FROM "base" AS "b"
  INNER JOIN "top_source" AS "t"
    ON "b"."source" = "t"."source"
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', "b"."date")
)
SELECT
  "t"."source",
  (SELECT MAX("period_revenue") FROM "daily") / 1000000 AS "max_daily_product_revenue_millions",
  (SELECT MAX("period_revenue") FROM "weekly") / 1000000 AS "max_weekly_product_revenue_millions",
  (SELECT MAX("period_revenue") FROM "monthly") / 1000000 AS "max_monthly_product_revenue_millions"
FROM "top_source" AS "t"
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-04-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-07-31')

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170415
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-04-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-07-31')
),
"session_flags" AS (
  SELECT
    s."month",
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."visitId",
    s."pageviews",
    s."transactions",
    MAX(IFF(p.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)) AS "has_product_revenue"
  FROM "sessions" AS s
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => s."hits", OUTER => TRUE) AS h
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => h.value:"product", OUTER => TRUE) AS p
  GROUP BY
    s."month",
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."visitId",
    s."pageviews",
    s."transactions"
),
"classified_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN "transactions" >= 1 AND "has_product_revenue" = 1 THEN 'purchase'
      WHEN "transactions" IS NULL AND "has_product_revenue" = 0 THEN 'non-purchase'
    END AS "purchase_status"
  FROM "session_flags"
  WHERE
    ("transactions" >= 1 AND "has_product_revenue" = 1)
    OR ("transactions" IS NULL AND "has_product_revenue" = 0)
),
"visitor_month_pageviews" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "purchase_status",
    "fullVisitorId",
    SUM("pageviews") AS "visitor_pageviews"
  FROM "classified_sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "purchase_status",
    "fullVisitorId"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  "purchase_status",
  AVG("visitor_pageviews") AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "visitor_month_pageviews"
GROUP BY
  "month",
  "purchase_status"
ORDER BY
  "month",
  "purchase_status"
selection_reason: Candidate 4 (strategy=time_first) scored -35.0; best score among failed candidates

WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170715
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170726
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170727
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "fullVisitorId", TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date", "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170731
),
"purchased_products" AS (
  SELECT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    p.value:"v2ProductName"::STRING AS "product_name",
    COALESCE(p.value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0) AS "product_quantity"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS s
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => s."hits") AS h
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => h.value:"product") AS p
  WHERE DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', s."session_date") = TO_DATE('20170701', 'YYYYMMDD')
    AND COALESCE(p.value:"productQuantity"::NUMBER, 0) > 0
),
"youtube_buyers" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "fullVisitorId"
  FROM "purchased_products"
  WHERE "product_name" ILIKE '%YouTube%'
),
"non_youtube_products" AS (
  SELECT
    pp."product_name",
    SUM(pp."product_quantity") AS "total_quantity"
  FROM "purchased_products" AS pp
  INNER JOIN "youtube_buyers" AS yb
    ON pp."fullVisitorId" = yb."fullVisitorId"
  WHERE pp."product_name" NOT ILIKE '%YouTube%'
  GROUP BY pp."product_name"
)
SELECT
  "product_name"
FROM "non_youtube_products"
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "total_quantity" DESC, "product_name") = 1
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=metric_first) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "date",
    "trafficSource",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170130
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "date",
    "trafficSource",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170131
),
"ordered_hits" AS (
  SELECT
    "s"."fullVisitorId",
    "s"."visitId",
    "h".index AS "hit_index",
    "h".value:"page":"pagePath"::TEXT AS "page_path",
    COALESCE("h".value:"time"::NUMBER, 0) / 1000 AS "time_on_home_seconds"
  FROM "sessions" AS "s",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "s"."hits") AS "h"
  WHERE "s"."date" >= '20170101'
    AND "s"."date" <= '20170131'
    AND "s"."trafficSource":"campaign"::TEXT ILIKE '%Data Share%'
),
"transitions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitId",
    "page_path" AS "home_page",
    LEAD("page_path") OVER (
      PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId", "visitId"
      ORDER BY "hit_index"
    ) AS "next_page",
    "time_on_home_seconds"
  FROM "ordered_hits"
),
"next_pages" AS (
  SELECT
    "next_page",
    COUNT(*) AS "transition_count",
    MAX("time_on_home_seconds") AS "max_time_on_home_seconds"
  FROM "transitions"
  WHERE "home_page" LIKE '/home%'
    AND "next_page" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "next_page"
)
SELECT
  "next_page",
  "max_time_on_home_seconds"
FROM "next_pages"
ORDER BY "transition_count" DESC, "next_page"
LIMIT 1

final_sql:
WITH "sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS "classification"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170602
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-06-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-07-31')
    AND "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS "classification"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170601
  WHERE "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER IS NOT NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER AS "pageviews",
    CASE
      WHEN COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS "classification"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630
  WHERE TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('2017-06-01') AND TO_DATE('2017-07-31')
    AND "totals":"pageviews"::NUMBER IS NOT NULL
),
"visitor_month_classification" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "classification",
    SUM("pageviews") AS "visitor_total_pageviews"
  FROM "sessions"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "fullVisitorId",
    "classification"
),
"monthly_averages" AS (
  SELECT
    "month",
    "classification",
    AVG("visitor_total_pageviews") AS "avg_pageviews_per_visitor"
  FROM "visitor_month_classification"
  GROUP BY
    "month",
    "classification"
)
SELECT
  "month",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "classification" = 'purchase' THEN "avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor",
  MAX(CASE WHEN "classification" = 'non_purchase' THEN "avg_pageviews_per_visitor" END) AS "avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor"
FROM "monthly_averages"
GROUP BY "month"
ORDER BY "month" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "event_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160814
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "event_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20161114
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "event_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160822
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "event_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    COALESCE("totals":"transactions"::NUMBER, 0) AS "transactions"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170114
),
"user_first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("event_date") AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"user_last_visit_event" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "event_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device_category",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId"
      ORDER BY "event_date" DESC, "visitStartTime" DESC
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "all_sessions"
),
"user_last_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "event_date" AS "last_visit_date",
    "visitStartTime" AS "last_visit_time",
    "device_category" AS "last_visit_device_category"
  FROM "user_last_visit_event"
  WHERE "rn" = 1
),
"user_first_transaction_event" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "event_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device_category",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId"
      ORDER BY "event_date" ASC, "visitStartTime" ASC
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "transactions" > 0
),
"user_first_transaction" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "event_date" AS "first_transaction_date",
    "visitStartTime" AS "first_transaction_time",
    "device_category" AS "first_transaction_device_category"
  FROM "user_first_transaction_event"
  WHERE "rn" = 1
),
"user_last_recorded_event" AS (
  SELECT
    "ufv"."fullVisitorId",
    "ufv"."first_visit_date",
    CASE
      WHEN "ft"."first_transaction_date" IS NOT NULL
           AND (
             "ft"."first_transaction_date" > "lv"."last_visit_date"
             OR (
               "ft"."first_transaction_date" = "lv"."last_visit_date"
               AND "ft"."first_transaction_time" >= "lv"."last_visit_time"
             )
           )
        THEN "ft"."first_transaction_date"
      ELSE "lv"."last_visit_date"
    END AS "last_recorded_event_date",
    CASE
      WHEN "ft"."first_transaction_date" IS NOT NULL
           AND (
             "ft"."first_transaction_date" > "lv"."last_visit_date"
             OR (
               "ft"."first_transaction_date" = "lv"."last_visit_date"
               AND "ft"."first_transaction_time" >= "lv"."last_visit_time"
             )
           )
        THEN "ft"."first_transaction_device_category"
      ELSE "lv"."last_visit_device_category"
    END AS "last_recorded_event_device_category"
  FROM "user_first_visit" "ufv"
  JOIN "user_last_visit" "lv"
    ON "ufv"."fullVisitorId" = "lv"."fullVisitorId"
  LEFT JOIN "user_first_transaction" "ft"
    ON "ufv"."fullVisitorId" = "ft"."fullVisitorId"
)
SELECT
  MAX(DATEDIFF(day, "first_visit_date", "last_recorded_event_date")) AS "longest_days_between_first_visit_and_last_recorded_event"
FROM "user_last_recorded_event"
WHERE "last_recorded_event_device_category" = 'mobile'

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "session_transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160804
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "session_transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "session_transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "session_transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160819
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') AS "session_date",
    "visitStartTime",
    "device":"deviceCategory"::STRING AS "device_category",
    "totals":"transactions"::NUMBER AS "session_transactions",
    "hits"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160823
  WHERE "fullVisitorId" IS NOT NULL
),
"first_visit" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    MIN("session_date") AS "first_visit_date"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  GROUP BY "fullVisitorId"
),
"transaction_sessions" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."session_date",
    s."visitStartTime",
    s."device_category"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS s
  WHERE COALESCE(s."session_transactions", 0) > 0
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT
    s."fullVisitorId",
    s."session_date",
    s."visitStartTime",
    s."device_category"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS s,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => s."hits") AS h
  WHERE h.value:"transaction":"transactionId" IS NOT NULL
     OR h.value:"transaction":"transactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL
),
"ranked_transactions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date",
    "device_category",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY "fullVisitorId"
      ORDER BY "session_date", "visitStartTime"
    ) AS "rn"
  FROM "transaction_sessions"
),
"first_transaction_mobile" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "session_date" AS "first_transaction_date"
  FROM "ranked_transactions"
  WHERE "rn" = 1
    AND LOWER(COALESCE("device_category", '')) = 'mobile'
)
SELECT
  fv."fullVisitorId"
FROM "first_visit" AS fv
JOIN "first_transaction_mobile" AS ftm
  ON fv."fullVisitorId" = ftm."fullVisitorId"
WHERE ftm."first_transaction_date" > fv."first_visit_date"
ORDER BY fv."fullVisitorId" ASC

final_sql:
WITH "all_sessions" AS (
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "visitStartTime",
    "date",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160805
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "visitStartTime",
    "date",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160806
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "visitStartTime",
    "date",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160827
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitNumber",
    "visitStartTime",
    "date",
    "totals"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160831
),
"new_users_in_period" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "fullVisitorId"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "visitNumber" = 1
    AND TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('20160801', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE('20170430', 'YYYYMMDD')
),
"qualified_initial_visits" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    "fullVisitorId",
    "visitStartTime"
  FROM "all_sessions"
  WHERE "visitNumber" = 1
    AND TO_DATE("date", 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE('20160801', 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE('20170430', 'YYYYMMDD')
    AND COALESCE(("totals":"timeOnSite")::NUMBER, 0) > 300
),
"subsequent_purchasers" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    s."fullVisitorId"
  FROM "all_sessions" AS s
  INNER JOIN "qualified_initial_visits" AS q
    ON s."fullVisitorId" = q."fullVisitorId"
  WHERE s."visitStartTime" > q."visitStartTime"
    AND COALESCE((s."totals":"transactions")::NUMBER, 0) > 0
)
SELECT
  100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT p."fullVisitorId") / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT n."fullVisitorId"), 0) AS "percentage_new_users"
FROM "new_users_in_period" AS n
LEFT JOIN "subsequent_purchasers" AS p
  ON n."fullVisitorId" = p."fullVisitorId";
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: aggregate shape confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "inventor_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "p"."publication_number",
    YEAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("p"."publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "publication_year",
    COUNT(*) AS "inventor_count_per_publication"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS "p",
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => "p"."inventor") AS "i"
  WHERE "p"."country_code" = 'CA'
    AND "p"."publication_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND YEAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("p"."publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN 1960 AND 2020
  GROUP BY
    "p"."publication_number",
    YEAR(TO_DATE(TO_VARCHAR("p"."publication_date"), 'YYYYMMDD'))
),
"grouped" AS (
  SELECT
    FLOOR(("publication_year" - 1960) / 5) * 5 + 1960 AS "interval_start_year",
    "inventor_count_per_publication"
  FROM "inventor_counts"
)
SELECT
  TO_VARCHAR("interval_start_year") || '-' || TO_VARCHAR("interval_start_year" + 4) AS "5_year_interval",
  AVG("inventor_count_per_publication") AS "avg_inventors_per_patent",
  COUNT(*) AS "patent_publication_count"
FROM "grouped"
GROUP BY "interval_start_year"
ORDER BY "interval_start_year" ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -25.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH "a61_publications" AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT
    p."publication_number",
    p."country_code",
    ah.value:"name"::STRING AS "assignee_name"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."assignee_harmonized") AS ah,
       LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."cpc") AS cpc
  WHERE cpc.value:"code"::STRING LIKE 'A61%'
    AND ah.value:"name"::STRING IS NOT NULL
    AND p."publication_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."country_code" IS NOT NULL
),
"assignee_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "total_patent_count"
  FROM "a61_publications"
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
),
"top_assignee" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name"
  FROM "assignee_totals"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "total_patent_count" DESC, "assignee_name") = 1
),
"top_assignee_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    "publication_number",
    "country_code",
    "assignee_name",
    SUBSTR("publication_number", 3, 4) AS "publication_year"
  FROM "a61_publications"
  WHERE "assignee_name" IN (SELECT "assignee_name" FROM "top_assignee")
),
"assignee_year_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "publication_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "publication_number") AS "year_patent_count"
  FROM "top_assignee_publications"
  WHERE TRY_TO_NUMBER("publication_year") IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "assignee_name", "publication_year"
),
"busiest_year" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    "publication_year"
  FROM "assignee_year_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "assignee_name" ORDER BY "year_patent_count" DESC, "publication_year") = 1
),
"jurisdiction_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    p."country_code",
    COUNT(DISTINCT p."publication_number") AS "patent_count"
  FROM "top_assignee_publications" AS p
  INNER JOIN "busiest_year" AS b
    ON p."assignee_name" = b."assignee_name"
   AND p."publication_year" = b."publication_year"
  GROUP BY p."country_code"
),
"top_5_jurisdictions" AS (
  SELECT
    "country_code",
    "patent_count"
  FROM "jurisdiction_counts"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code") <= 5
)
SELECT LISTAGG("country_code", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "patent_count" DESC, "country_code") AS "top_5_jurisdiction_codes"
FROM "top_5_jurisdictions";
selection_reason: Candidate 4 (strategy=time_first) scored -45.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH "a61_publications" AS (
  SELECT
    p."application_number",
    p."filing_date",
    COALESCE(
      p."assignee_harmonized":"name"::TEXT,
      p."assignee":"name"::TEXT,
      p."assignee_harmonized"::TEXT,
      p."assignee"::TEXT
    ) AS "assignee_name"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS p,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(INPUT => p."uspc") AS f
  WHERE p."application_number" IS NOT NULL
    AND p."filing_date" IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      f.VALUE::TEXT ILIKE '%A61%'
      OR p."uspc"::TEXT ILIKE '%A61%'
    )
),
"assignee_totals" AS (
  SELECT
    "assignee_name",
    COUNT(DISTINCT "application_number") AS "total_applications"
  FROM "a61_publications"
  WHERE COALESCE("assignee_name", '') <> ''
  GROUP BY "assignee_name"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "total_applications" DESC, "assignee_name") = 1
),
"yearly_counts" AS (
  SELECT
    a."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(a."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "filing_year",
    COUNT(DISTINCT a."application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM "a61_publications" AS a
  INNER JOIN "assignee_totals" AS t
    ON a."assignee_name" = t."assignee_name"
  GROUP BY
    a."assignee_name",
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(a."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD'))
)
SELECT
  "assignee_name",
  "filing_year",
  "application_count"
FROM "yearly_counts"
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY "application_count" DESC, "filing_year" DESC) = 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=join_first) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed
